"[5] ^SIGALERT UPDATE IN WESTCHESTER: NB I-405 AT HOWARD HUGHES PARKWAY. ALL NORTHBOUND LANES WILL REMAIN CLOSED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE. THE SEPULVEDA BLVD ON-RAMP, HOWARD HUGHES PKWY ON-RAMP, AND THE LA TIJERA BLVD ON-RAMP WILL ALSO BE CLOSED. ALL TRAFFIC WILL BE DIVERTED OFF AT HOWARD HUGHES PARKWAY, DUE TO POLICE ACTIVITY."

"[3] ^SIGALERT ISSUED IN SYLMAR: EB I-210 EAST OF ROXFORD ST. ALL EASTBOUND LANES WILL BE CLOSED FOR AN UNKNOWN DURATION. ALL TRAFFIC WILL BE DIVERTED OFF AT ROXFORD ST OFF-RAMP, DUE TO A TRAFFIC CRASH."
"[1] ^MEDIA LOG FOR JUNE 05, 2026"
"[5] 83-CZP1 CLOSURE WILL REMAIN TIL 0500 HRS"
